title: Sealapack Press & Seal Freezer and Food Bags | 60 Food-bag rolls | Extra Strong Reusable Food & Freezer Bags | 17CM X 21CM Simple Home & Living Sandwich Bags that are Reusable and sealable. (1)
features: Our durable, thick, non toxic freezer storage bags are created from plastic that is food-grade.
We can store nuts, popcorn, smoothie mix, sandwiches, lunch and candies in our food bags.
Our 60-pack of 17cm x 21cm reusable, freezer bags are our press and seal bags to save money.
All of your meals will stay fresh and delicious for longer in heavy duty BPA-free lunch bags.
These travel-friendly, compact food containers fit neatly inside any bag, backpack and handbags.
description: With the quality reusable freezer bags, which include a very practical press and seal , you can now organise, store, and preserve your meals like a seasoned experienced parent. It doesn't get any better than freezer bags with zip when it comes to multipurpose food storage bags that simplify freezer organisation and eliminate all the effort of preserving your fresh fruits and vegetables for your morning smoothie. Fruits, vegetables, meats, toiletries, stationery, toys, and maps may all be stored in the bags. You could also store liquids like cream, sauce, salad dressing, and much more. You can finally make the switch from expensive disposable sandwich bags or single-use plastic food bags to a set of reusable, simple-to-clean, food bags that will last a lifetime. But there's more! A single bag may replace more than 500 single-use plastic bags annually. Enjoy Your Snacks Anywhere: Use our airtight seal sandwich bags to pack your child's lunch or to pack your business lunch to keep it fresh. You can also pack sandwiches like never before and store your camping snacks in your backpack. We're assured you'll appreciate this product! There is no place for compromise when it comes to keeping our consumers satisfied and providing the high quality they expect.
